tender.description: Installation of 2 Nos. Submersible pump within 80 mm dia and 72 m depth PVC pipe for withdrawn water of drinking tubewell by using Water jet system...Structure stand at (i) Sabujpally Kuyotala an Mathpara Canalpar in ward No-11 under Bolpur Munici
